failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Use AmLactin Alpha-Hydroxy Therapy Body Lotion for chemical exfoliation combined with a gentle physical scrub like Cetaphil Body Scrub to address keratosis pilaris effectively. failedPrompts.query: does coffee scrub actually work for cellulite and stretch marks
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Coffee scrubs provide modest improvement in appearance of cellulite and stretch marks through improved circulation and exfoliation, but won't eliminate them. For significant results on these concerns, combine with Bio-Oil, retinol creams, and consistent hydration over 8-12 weeks.
